TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Gbayang, title = Gbayang, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gbayang} }

S.FORM: alang Gbayang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 120 buwan, 368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 88%, Amis 1%, Tayan 2%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Gbayang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gbayang hya' ga Ciyakang. tay mkyahu' na Gbayang hya' ga Murisaka. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Gbayang ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Gbayang ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Gbayang ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Banrong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 120 buwan, 368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 9 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 88%, Amis 1%, Tayan 2%, Kebalan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Gbayang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gbayang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gbayang hya' ga Ciyakang. tay mkyahu' na Gbayang hya' ga Murisaka. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Gbayang ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Gbayang ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣβajaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βanroŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, keβalan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨijakaŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣβajaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa muris~ɕaka. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ɣβajaŋ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ɣβajaŋ ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
